title: Emma Barclay Superdry Check 6 Pack - Terry Check Luxury Tea Towel - 45x65cm
features: ODD JOB TOWEL: Crafted from 100% cotton this checked tea towel is perfect for everyday use, whether it be washing up, drying, cleaning up messes, polishing or messy crafts. Our superdry tea towels are designed to be long lasting and fast drying to allow for constant use, perfectly dry dishes and mopping up spillages.
100% COTTON: As soft as tea towels come, these Superdry tea towels are VERY ABSORBENT. 100% made from soft cotton fibres to give you the best drying up, wiping surface tea towel you deserve.

6 PACK: What could be better than having one Superdry checked cotton fibred tea towel for your kitchen?... Having 6 in a plethora of colours, these tea towels come as a pack of 6 to always leave you with a fresh towel to have at hand. Whether you're a home cook or a chef or even a cleaner, this is the perfect tea towel companion for you.

MACHINE WASHABLE: Not only do you get the luxury of having more than one tea towel but they are also incredibly easy to maintain! Once you have had your uses for the tea towel and feel like it's wash time, simply throw it in the washing machine and it's quick effective drying will ensure it's ready for its next use in no time at all!

DESIGN: To reiterate again, this tea towel comes as a pack of 6 in a variety of colours!! Mix different towels to create a PERFECT look for any kitchen design with its checked design, cotton fibres and standard UK sizing.
description: Transform your kitchen with our super absorbent and easy-care tea towels. These soft touch tea towels feature a vibrant multicoloured chequered motif, perfect for adding a splash of color to any kitchen design. Whether you're drying dishes, polishing surfaces, or handling messy crafts, our highly absorbent and extra-large tea towels are perfect for every odd job around the kitchen. Our teatowels are made from 100% cotton, offering a soft and durable fabric that provides the best drying and wiping surface you deserve. These cotton tea towels are not only practical but also stylish, fitting seamlessly into your kitchen essentials. Machine washable for easy care, these tea towels ensure quick and effective drying, ready for their next use in no time. Ideal for everyday use, our tea towels for kitchen are perfect for washing up, cleaning up messes, and polishing. Available in a range of colors including black tea towels, grey tea towels, pink tea towels, green tea towels, and blue tea towels, there's a perfect match for every kitchen decor. The checked design and cotton fibres offer a quality and stylish look that complements any kitchen accessories. Our tea towels pack includes multiple pieces, ensuring you always have a fresh towel on hand. Designed with practicality in mind, these dish towels for drying dishes won't disappoint. For those who appreciate quality, our tea towels are a must-have home essential. Enhance your kitchen with these household essentials, perfect for new home essentials or as a thoughtful gift. Available in a variety of sizes, these kitchen towels are suitable for any task, from drying dishes to cleaning spills. With their easy-care design, simply throw them in the washing machine for hassle-free maintenance. Our tea towels are the epitome of quality and practicality, making them a valuable addition to your kitchen cloth collection. Trust in our durable and absorbent kitchen towels cotton to meet all your drying and cleaning needs.
